response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and has no demonstrated exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains; their C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work over a decade ago, and their professional focus for the last 8+ years has been entirely on web, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang — none of which satisfy the core technical or domain requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical education (workshops, CI/CD setup)
Extensive background in distributed systems, real-time data, and performance-critical applications
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows in the last 8+ years; violates mandatory requirement
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or with SQL Server/Oracle
